metadata.description: Marketing plugins for Claude Code and Anthropic Cowork. All plugins ship zero global hooks and zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence; comply with the Anthropic Software Directory Policy; HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. Every plugin (where applicable) ships a .mcp.json.connectors-reference catalog documenting Cowork-compatible aggregator paths (Pipedream, Composio, Zapier, Make.com) for services with no first-party HTTP MCP. Slash command syntax is canonical /<plugin-name>:<command> per Claude Code's auto-namespacing.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology. **v3.4.1** is an audit + corrections pass: C2PA script rewritten against real c2pa-python 0.32 API and end-to-end tested (was broken on v3.4.0 ship); ads MCP entries corrected to verified endpoints (Synter Media AI 7 platforms, Ryze AI Google Ads managed-OAuth, Northbeam community-maintained); parallel-dispatch speedup softened from flat 6x to honest 4-6x parallelism with ~50-80% wall-clock reduction; unverified submission URL removed. v3.4 added C2PA content-provenance for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance, unified ads-platform MCPs, explicit parallel subagent dispatch in engagement-workflow + 4 multi-dimensional commands, Anthropic Software Directory submission packet. v3.3 modernized May 2026 reality: EU AI Act, DPDP Phase II, NY synthetic-performer law, FTC May 2026 endorsement guidance, CCPA ADMT, CJEU pseudonymization; LinkedIn + Depth Score, email DMARC + RFC 8058, TikTok USDS + AI labeling, WhatsApp per-message pricing, schema + LLMs.txt, Sora deprecation; Google AI Overviews + Profound/Otterly/Conductor. 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Living Project Instruction File. 25 specialist agents, 150 skills, 71 Python scripts, 10 commands, 14 HTTP MCP connectors, 16 industry profiles, 16 privacy-law jurisdictions.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, and 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors. v3.9.5 splits Phase 6 internal linking into three categories — topical (informational), commercial (brand product/service pages), and conversion (audience-matched CTA) — with a new brand_pages schema, inline color-coded Word hyperlinks, Appendix D internal link map, and a stricter reviewer rubric (drops the 'no site structure = full credit' free-pass). v3.9.4 fixes pipeline orchestration to actually invoke subagents via Task tool and adds scripts/generate-docx.py for real Microsoft Word output with embedded SEO/Quality/Production appendices. v3.9 ships a 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, self-critique meta-pass, and optional voice calibration.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation with asset-first compositing, AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), and video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro). **v1.6.0** adds end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance (applicable 2 Aug 2026): new scripts/c2pa_sign.py wrapping c2pa-python 0.32, new /socialforge:c2pa-sign skill, and optional auto-sign hooks in generate_image.py + video_postprocess.py that embed machine-readable provenance manifests (brand + generator + prompt + platform + IPTC digital-source-type) before assets hit delivery. Plus May 2026 channel-pack reference (TikTok USDS post-Jan 2026, LinkedIn March 2026 algo + Depth Score, Apple MPP, YouTube AI labeling, Sora deprecation note). 25 commands, 16 skills, 5 agents, 20 scripts, 10 HTTP connectors. v1.5 ships zero global hooks. All 10 connectors are HTTP — fully Cowork-compatible.
